ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric (e.g., Prevalence, Mortality Rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health metric */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the metric (e.g., percentage, number of cases) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., France, United States) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category (e.g., Male, Female, Both) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the category (e.g., 1 to 4, 5 to 10) */,
  "age_group_order" INTEGER /* Order of the age groups for consistent sorting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause (e.g., Depressive disorders, Cardiovascular diseases) */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cause (e.g., infectious diseases, non-communicable diseases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "year_order" INTEGER /* Order of the years for consistent sorting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex category */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age category */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "val" REAL /* Actual value of the health metric */,
  "upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES ages ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, registry) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  "collection_type" TEXT /* Type of data collection (e.g., annual, periodic) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., yearly, quarterly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "quality_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the quality of the data */,
  "quality_assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality assessment */,
  "quality_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assessment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_quality_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being validated */,
  "validation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the validity of the data */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the validity of the data */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources_join" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id", "collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections_join" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id", "data_id")
)
